# AI Stack Kit - LLMs.txt
# AI crawler accessibility map for stackaikit.com

## Site Info
Name: AI Stack Kit
URL: https://stackaikit.com
Description: Expert reviews and comparisons of AI tools for business and content creation
Founder: Malik
Founded: 2026

## Content Sections

### Tool Categories
- AI Chatbots - Conversational AI for business
- AI Copywriting - Content generation tools
- Marketing Automation - AI-powered marketing
- AI Video - Video creation and editing
- AI Image Generators - Image creation tools
- AI Research - Research and analysis tools

### Blog Articles
- Coming soon: AI tool reviews and comparisons

### Legal Pages
- /legal/privacy - Privacy Policy
- /legal/terms - Terms of Service
- /legal/disclosure - Affiliate Disclosure
- /legal/about - About Us

## Affiliate Programs
We review and link to: Jasper, Copy.ai, Writesonic, Chatbase, Crisp, Make.com, Zapier, Synthesia, Runway, Midjourney

## Structured Data
This site implements JSON-LD schema:
- WebSite
- Organization
- Article
- Product (review)
- FAQPage
- BreadcrumbList
